items.q: What is the ideal hair length?
items.a: For your first visit, 5–7 mm is ideal (about 2 weeks after shaving). For subsequent visits, 3–5 mm is sufficient.
Sensations vary by person, but we use professional techniques and premium products to minimize discomfort. It gets easier with every session!

items.q: Will there be irritation after the treatment?
items.a: Slight redness is a normal reaction that typically fades within a few hours. We apply soothing care and provide post-treatment advice for your home routine.

items.q: How often should I get waxed?
items.a: We recommend a visit every 3–4 weeks. This allows the hair to reach the optimal length for the most effective removal.

items.q: How long do the results last?
items.a: Your skin will stay smooth for an average of 2–4 weeks, depending on the area, hair type, and your natural growth cycle.
